mapper.sql: id, project_id, chapter_number, title, content, word_count, group_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chapter ( project_id, chapter_number, title, content, word_count, group_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{chapter.projectId}, #{chapter.chapterNumber}, #{chapter.title}, #{chapter.content}, #{chapter.wordCount}, #{chapter.groupId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM chapter WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY chapter_number ASC
SELECT FROM chapter WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY chapter_number ASC
